text:
Here’s what to do next to get your weather:

- Tell me the location
  - City and country (e.g., Paris, FR)
  - ZIP/postal code (e.g., 94107)
  - Coordinates (latitude, longitude) (e.g., 37.7749, -122.4194)
  - Or say: “use my location” to use your current position

- Tell me what you want
  - Current conditions (now)
  - Forecast (e.g., next 5 days or next 24 hours)

- Optional: specify units (C or F)

Examples:
- “Weather for New York, US, current”
- “Weather for 10001, forecast”
- “Weather for 37.7749, -122.4194, current”
- “Weather for use my location, forecast”

Tell me your choice and I’ll fetch it.
